track conversations via Grok's x_search.

Premium data source: real-time access to X/Twitter that agents can't
get through standard web scraping.

get.description:
Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED) — authoritative US economic indicators.

Key indicators:
- GDP: Gross Domestic Product (quarterly)
- UNRATE: Unemployment Rate (monthly)  
- CPIAUCSL: Consumer Price Index / inflation (monthly)
- FEDFUNDS: Federal Funds Rate (daily)
- T10Y2Y: Treasury yield spread / recession signal (daily)
- INDPRO: Industrial Production (monthly)
- PAYEMS: Nonfarm Payrolls (monthly)
- HOUST: Housing Starts (monthly)
- PCEC1: Personal Consumption (monthly)
- PSAVERT: Personal Saving Rate (monthly)
- M2SL: M2 Money Supply (weekly)
- DEXUSEU: USD/EUR Exchange Rate (daily)

parameters.name: indicators

schema.description: Comma-separated indicator IDs (GDP, UNRATE, CPIAUCSL, FEDFUNDS, T10Y2Y, INDPRO, PAYEMS, HOUST, PCEC1, PSAVERT, M2SL, DEXUSEU)
schema.title: Indicators

parameters.description: Comma-separated indicator IDs (GDP, UNRATE, CPIAUCSL, FEDFUNDS, T10Y2Y, INDPRO, PAYEMS, HOUST, PCEC1, PSAVERT, M2SL, DEXUSEU)

parameters.name: detail

schema.description: Get detailed data for a single indicator (overrides indicators list)
schema.title: Detail

parameters.description: Get detailed data for a single indicator (overrides indicators list)

parameters.name: years

schema.description: Years of history (0 = auto based on indicator frequency)
schema.title: Years

parameters.description: Years of history (0 = auto based on indicator frequency)

schema.title: Response Economic Indicators Api Economic Indicators Get

get.description:
World Bank country development indicators for 260+ countries.

Use aliases (gdp, population, inflation) or full WB indicator IDs.
Compare mode: pass 'compare' param with country codes for cross-country ranking.

parameters.name: country

schema.description: 2-letter ISO country code (US, CN, DE, IN, BR, JP, GB, FR, etc.)
schema.title: Country

parameters.description: 2-letter ISO country code (US, CN, DE, IN, BR, JP, GB, FR, etc.)

parameters.name: indicators

schema.description: Comma-separated indicator aliases: gdp, gdp_growth, gdp_per_capita, population, pop_growth, life_expectancy, infant_mortality, inflation, unemployment, trade, gni_per_capita, literacy, energy_use, internet_users, co2_emissions
schema.title: Indicators

parameters.description: Comma-separated indicator aliases: gdp, gdp_growth, gdp_per_capita, population, pop_growth, life_expectancy, infant_mortality, inflation, unemployment, trade, gni_per_capita, literacy, energy_use, internet_users, co2_emissions

parameters.name: compare

schema.description: Compare countries: comma-separated codes (e.g. US,CN,DE). Compares on first indicator.
schema.title: Compare

parameters.description: Compare countries: comma-separated codes (e.g. US,CN,DE). Compares on first indicator.

schema.title: Response Country Metrics Api Country Metrics Get

get.description:
Live malware URL threat intelligence feed from URLhaus (abuse.ch).

20,000+ malware distribution URLs updated every 5 minutes.
Filter by status (online/offline), threat type, malware family tags.
Use check_url to verify if a URL is a known malware distributor.

parameters.name: threat

schema.description: Filter by threat type: malware_download, phishing
schema.title: Threat

parameters.description: Filter by threat type: malware_download, phishing

parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Filter by malware tag: Mozi, ClearFake, Emotet, AgentTesla, mirai
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Filter by malware tag: Mozi, ClearFake, Emotet, AgentTesla, mirai

parameters.name: check_url

schema.description: Check if a specific URL is in the malware feed
schema.title: Check Url

parameters.description: Check if a specific URL is in the malware feed

parameters.name: stats_only

schema.description: Return feed statistics only (no URL list)
schema.title: Stats Only

parameters.description: Return feed statistics only (no URL list)

schema.title: Response Malware Feed Api Malware Feed Get

get.description:
Create a session proxy — returns a session_id for use with /api/proxy/session/fetch.

$0.50/min. 5min max. 250MB cap. Geo-targeting. 500%+ markup.
Credentials are NEVER exposed — all proxying is server-side.
Max 5 sessions per wallet, 50 global.

schema.title: Response Proxy Session Create Api Proxy Session Get

get.description:
Fetch a URL using an active session proxy. No additional payment required.

Use the session_id from /api/proxy/session. Session must be active (not expired).

schema.description: URL to fetch through the session proxy
